content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules recurring hourly push notifications (NotificationScheduler.swift:9-10, "repeats: true", interval 3600) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:3), matching Apple's spam-push pattern.

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits using push notifications for promotional/marketing spam or unsolicited recurring alerts not tied to user-initiated content, and reviewers actively look for phrases like "every hour" or "unlimited" in metadata as red flags. Here both the code (`scheduleHourlyDeals` with a repeating hourly trigger) and the store description confirm exactly this pattern. Recommend switching to user-configurable alert frequency (opt-in, adjustable interval) and removing the "every hour/unlimited" marketing language before submission.
